rows.scripted: Don’t leave... the turret facing the wall.
rows.heard: Don't leave the turret facing the wall.

rows.scripted: Feed... terminated.
rows.heard: feet terminated

rows.scripted: Gun’s still loaded... do not waste it.
rows.heard: Guns still loaded. Do not waste it.

rows.scripted: Tell ’em... we held.
rows.heard: Tell him we held.

rows.scripted: Hey... don’t let ’em take the sky.
rows.heard: Hey, don't let him take the sky.

rows.scripted: Keep... the beam on them.
rows.heard: Keep the beam on them.

rows.scripted: Close... the route behind me.
rows.heard: Close. The route behind me.

rows.scripted: Patient on the floor. Cover me.
rows.heard: "'Patient on the floor. Cover me.'

rows.scripted: Tools down. Shotgun up.
rows.heard: Tools down. Shotgun up.

rows.scripted: Bring the carrier through my sentry arc.
rows.heard: Bring the carrier through my sentry arc.

rows.scripted: Contamination cleared. Metal may breathe again.
rows.heard: Contamination cleared. Metal may breathe again.

rows.scripted: Give me thirty seconds and one defensible corner.
rows.heard: Give me thirty seconds in one defensible corner.

rows.scripted: Patch requires patching. Yes, I hear it.
rows.heard: Patch requires patching. Yes, I hear it.

rows.scripted: Delivered within acceptable tolerances.
rows.heard: delivered within acceptable tolerances.

rows.scripted: Flag down near me! I can fortify it!
rows.heard: Flag down near me. I can fortify it.

rows.scripted: Flag acquired. I did not bring the fast boots.
rows.heard: "'Flag acquired. "'I did not bring the fast boots.'

rows.scripted: Explosive in the workspace! Clear!
rows.heard: Explosive in the workspace! Clear!

rows.scripted: This position has good bones. Let me improve it.
rows.heard: This position has good bones. Let me improve it.

rows.scripted: Naveen Singh. Patch if something is broken. Mister Singh if you broke it.
rows.heard: Naveen Singh, patch if something is broken. Mr. Singh, if you broke it.

rows.scripted: Diagnosis: poor maintenance.
rows.heard: Diagnosis? Poor maintenance.

rows.scripted: That repair is beyond warranty.
rows.heard: That repair is beyond warranty.

rows.scripted: Leaking in several non-approved places.
rows.heard: "'leaking in several non-approved places.'

rows.scripted: Mine armed. Remember where your feet are.
rows.heard: Mine armed. Remember where your feet are.

rows.scripted: Moving the workshop.
rows.heard: Moving the workshop.

rows.scripted: Feeding the problem-solver.
rows.heard: Feeding the problem solver?

rows.scripted: Excellent. I remain billable.
rows.heard: Excellent. I remain billable.

rows.scripted: I fix people reluctantly. Hold still.
rows.heard: I fix people reluctantly. Hold still.

rows.scripted: They are shooting the engineer. Predictable and rude.
rows.heard: They are shooting the engineer! Predictable and rude.

rows.scripted: Sentry seated. Arc is clear.
rows.heard: Sentry seated. Arc is clear.

rows.scripted: My sentry is gone. I take that personally.
rows.heard: My sentry is gone. I take that personally.

rows.scripted: Sentry has movement. Heads down.
rows.heard: Sentry has movement. Heads down.

rows.scripted: Hold her steady. I have the engine.
rows.heard: Hold her steady. I have the engine.

rows.scripted: Vehicle is clean. Try not to invent a new noise.
rows.heard: Vehicle is clean. Try not to invent a new noise.

rows.scripted: Friendly down. I have the safe approach.
rows.heard: Friendly down. I have the safe approach.

rows.scripted: Marked lane. Take the shot.
rows.heard: Mark Lane. Take the shot.

rows.scripted: Carrier covered. I am watching the watchers.
rows.heard: Gary are covered. I am watching the watchers.

rows.scripted: Keep talking. Noise gives me edges.
rows.heard: Keep talking. Noise gives me edges.

rows.scripted: Switch is down. Feed is still live.
rows.heard: Switch is down. Feed is still live.

rows.scripted: Eye is gone. We work blind.
rows.heard: Her eye is gone. We work blind.

rows.scripted: Taking the drone. Guard the quiet body.
rows.heard: Taking the drone. Guard the quiet body.

rows.scripted: Little eye, up.
rows.heard: Little eye up.

rows.scripted: Marked. Through the wall, three meters right.
rows.heard: Marked. Through the wall. Three meters right.

rows.scripted: EMP set. Armor’s about to forget its name.
rows.heard: EMP Sen. Armor's about to forget its name.

rows.scripted: Vehicle stalled. Move before it remembers.
rows.heard: Vehicle stalled. Move before it remembers.

rows.scripted: They never saw the handoff.
rows.heard: They never saw the handoff.

rows.scripted: Flag down. Enemy eyes converging.
rows.heard: Flag down. Enemy eyes converging.

rows.scripted: Flag in hand. Their cameras missed the exchange.
rows.heard: Flag in hand. Their cameras missed the exchange.

rows.scripted: Charge in! Three steps, any direction!
rows.heard: Charge in three steps any direction

rows.scripted: I have eyes through the wall. Hold still and listen.
rows.heard: I have eyes through the wall. Hold still and listen.

rows.scripted: Elias Baptiste. Switch on comms. I see the room before the room sees us.
rows.heard: Elias Baptiste. Switch on comms. I see the room before the room sees us.

rows.scripted: Contact erased.
rows.heard: Contact Erased.

rows.scripted: Their picture just went dark.
rows.heard: Their picture just went dark.

rows.scripted: I’m bleeding. Signal remains.
rows.heard: Ah. Bleed. Signal remains.

rows.scripted: Moving underneath their attention.
rows.heard: Moving underneath their attention.

rows.scripted: Reloading. Drone keeps watch.
rows.heard: Reloading. Drone Keeps Watch.

rows.scripted: Back online.
rows.heard: Back online.

rows.scripted: Stay quiet. Let them think the room is empty.
rows.heard: Stay quiet. Let them think the room is empty.

rows.scripted: Signal degrading. Bringing the eye home.
rows.heard: Signal degrading. Bringing the eye home.

rows.scripted: They found my body! Break their sightline!
rows.heard: They found my body! Break their sight line!

rows.scripted: Stay there. I am bringing the wall.
rows.heard: Stay there! I am bringing the wall!

rows.scripted: Heavy fire, coming through!
rows.heard: Heavy fire coming through.

rows.scripted: Bracing. Let it eat.
rows.heard: Bracing! Let it eat!

rows.scripted: Cannon dry. This is socially awkward.
rows.heard: Cannon dry. This is socially awkward.

rows.scripted: Stay behind the heavy. Yes, that is me.
rows.heard: Stay behind the heavy. Yes, that is me.

rows.scripted: Big gun, small doorway. We will negotiate.
rows.heard: Big gun, small doorway. We will negotiate.

rows.scripted: Big target is down. Little help?
rows.heard: Ugh! Big target is down! Little help?

rows.scripted: Slow delivery. Same receipt.
rows.heard: Slow delivery, same receipt.

rows.scripted: Flag is down! I will make room around it!
rows.heard: Flag is down. I will make room around it.

rows.scripted: I have the flag. This was not the fast plan.
rows.heard: I have the flag. This was not the fast plan.

rows.scripted: Grenade! Outside the dome—move!
rows.heard: GRENADE! OUTSIDE THE DOME! MOVE!

rows.scripted: Behind me. We make our stand here.
rows.heard: Behind me, we make our stand here.

rows.scripted: Omar Haddad. You bring me targets; I bring the weather.
rows.heard: Omar Haddad. You bring me targets, I bring the weather.

rows.scripted: That problem has become spare parts.
rows.heard: That problem has become spare parts.

rows.scripted: See? A very efficient meeting.
rows.heard: See? A very efficient meeting.

rows.scripted: Armor’s gone. Omar remains.
rows.heard: Armors gone, Omar remains.

rows.scripted: Armor marked. Missile away!
rows.heard: Armor marked. Missile away.

rows.scripted: Direct hit. The machine felt that.
rows.heard: Direct hit. The machine felt that.

rows.scripted: I am moving. The ammunition is moving slower.
rows.heard: I am moving. The ammunition is moving slower.

rows.scripted: Long reload. This is why I have friends.
rows.heard: Ah, long reload. This is why I have friends.

rows.scripted: Ah. Back to being everybody’s wall.
rows.heard: Back to being everybody's wall.

rows.scripted: Easy, my friend. Heavy hands can still be gentle.
rows.heard: Easy, my friend. Heavy hands can still be gentle.

rows.scripted: Dome is cracking! Choose your next cover!
rows.heard: Dome is cracking! Choose your next cover!

rows.scripted: Dome up! Bring your breathing inside.
rows.heard: Dome up! Bring your breathing inside!

rows.scripted: Rounds on the heavy! I noticed!
rows.heard: Rounds on the heavy, I noticed.

rows.scripted: We got one down! I’m going.
rows.heard: We got one down! I'm going!

rows.scripted: Front sight, center mass. Work ’em.
rows.heard: Front sight, center mass, work them.

rows.scripted: Carrier moving. Shoulders out, eyes wide.
rows.heard: Carrier moving, shoulders out, eyes wide.

rows.scripted: Nothing fancy. We take the ground, then we keep it.
rows.heard: Nothing fancy. We take the ground and we keep it.

rows.scripted: I’m down, not done. Drag me in.
rows.heard: I'm down! Not done! Drag me in!

rows.scripted: That’s home. That’s a point. Reset.
rows.heard: That's home. That's a point. Reset.

rows.scripted: Flag loose! Nobody dies staring at it!
rows.heard: Flag loose! Nobody dies staring at it!

rows.scripted: Flag’s with me. Build me a road.
rows.heard: Flags with me. Build me a road.

rows.scripted: Bad bounce! Break!
rows.heard: Bad bounce! Break!

rows.scripted: Cooking it... now!
rows.heard: Cookin' it. Now!

rows.scripted: There they go. Rifles finish it.
rows.heard: There they go. Rifles finish it.

rows.scripted: Frag ready. Call the pocket.
rows.heard: Frag ready. Call the pocket.

rows.scripted: Sending one!
rows.heard: Send in one.

rows.scripted: Frag! Off the wall—move!
rows.heard: Frag! Off the wall! Move!

rows.scripted: This patch is ours. Make ’em pay rent.
rows.heard: This patch is ours. Make them pay rent.

rows.scripted: Gabe Reyes. Rifle up, eyes open. Stay near me and we all get home.
rows.heard: K. Bray is. Rifle up, eyes open. Stay near me. We all get home.

rows.scripted: One down. Keep scanning.
rows.heard: One down. Keep scanning.

rows.scripted: Lane’s clear. Push it before they reconsider.
rows.heard: Lane's clear. Push it before they reconsider.

rows.scripted: I’m hit. Still useful.
rows.heard: I'm hit. Still useful.

rows.scripted: On me. Short rushes.
rows.heard: On me. Short rushes.

rows.scripted: Changing magazine. Cover my lane.
rows.heard: Changing magazine. Cover my lane.

rows.scripted: There we go. Back in the fight.
rows.heard: There we go. I'm back in the fight.

rows.scripted: Stay with me. Breathe and look at me.
rows.heard: Stay with me. Breathe and look at me.

rows.scripted: Contact, front-left! Get small!
rows.heard: Contact! Front left! Get small!

rows.scripted: They got eyes up. Changing altitude.
rows.heard: They got eyes up. Changing altitude.

rows.scripted: From your blind side!
rows.heard: From your blind side!

rows.scripted: Hold on! I’m coming over the wall!
rows.heard: Hold on, I'm coming over the wall.

rows.scripted: Dropping in—make room!
rows.heard: Drop it in! Make room!

rows.scripted: Carrier below me. Touch them and I drop on you.
rows.heard: Carrier below me! Touch him and I drop on you!

rows.scripted: Y’all take the road. I’m allergic to traffic.
rows.heard: Y'all take the road. I'm allergic to traffic.

rows.scripted: Okay, gravity won one. Come get me.
rows.heard: Okay, Gravity 1-1, come get me.

rows.scripted: Air mail, delivered.
rows.heard: Air Mail. Delivered.

rows.scripted: Flag down! I can reach it—cover me!
rows.heard: Flag down! I can reach it! Cover me!

rows.scripted: Got the flag. Tell the ground crew to keep up.
rows.heard: Got the flag. Tell the ground crew to keep up.

rows.scripted: No thrust! Clear my landing!
rows.heard: No thrust! Clear my landing!

rows.scripted: Tank’s coughing. I’m coming down.
rows.heard: Tank's coughing. I'm coming down.

rows.scripted: Grenade! Cute—move!
rows.heard: Grenade! Cue! Move!

rows.scripted: Feet down. Knees filing complaints.
rows.heard: Feet down. Knees filing complaints.

rows.scripted: I got high side. Don’t make me babysit low.
rows.heard: I got high side. Don't make me babysit low.

rows.scripted: Keisha Bell—Kite on comms. If you lose me, look up.
rows.heard: Keisha Bell, Kite On Combs. If you lose me, look up.

rows.scripted: Kite going vertical.
rows.heard: Kite going vertical!

rows.scripted: Fuel’s back. Sky’s mine.
rows.heard: Fuel's back. Sky's mine.

rows.scripted: Caught you looking straight ahead.
rows.heard: Caught you looking straight ahead.

rows.scripted: That whole corner needed an attitude adjustment.
rows.heard: That whole corner needed an attitude adjustment.

rows.scripted: Jet’s fine. I am less fine.
rows.heard: Jet's fine. I am less fine.

rows.scripted: Roofline. Meet me there.
rows.heard: Roofline, meet me there.

rows.scripted: Reloading in the air. Terrible life choices.
rows.heard: Reloading in the air. Terrible life choices.

rows.scripted: See? Can’t keep good trouble grounded.
rows.heard: See? Can't keep good trouble grounded.

rows.scripted: Don’t quit while I’m down here being responsible.
rows.heard: Don't quit while I'm down here being responsible.

rows.scripted: Oh, they mad-mad! Shots from the east!
rows.heard: Oh, they mad mad. Shots from the east.

rows.scripted: I see you. Keep pressure on it.
rows.heard: I see you. Keep pressure on it.

rows.scripted: Contact. I am a doctor with a weapon, not a pacifist.
rows.heard: Contact. I am a doctor with a weapon, not a pacifist.

rows.scripted: Beam is dry. Cover me while it charges.
rows.heard: Beam is dry. Cover me while it charges.

rows.scripted: Protect the carrier. I will keep them moving.
rows.heard: Protect the carrier. I will keep them moving.

rows.scripted: Check your seals, your magazines, and the person beside you.
rows.heard: Check your seals, your magazines and the person beside you.

rows.scripted: Medic down. Yes, the irony is noted.
rows.heard: Medic down. Yes, the irony is noted.

rows.scripted: Objective secured. Now who needs stitches?
rows.heard: Objective secured. Now who needs stitches?

rows.scripted: Flag down! Stabilize the lane first!
rows.heard: Flag down! Stabilise the lane first!

rows.scripted: I have the flag. Apparently everyone else was bleeding.
rows.heard: I have the flag. Apparently everyone else was bleeding.

rows.scripted: Grenade! Patients and future patients—move!
rows.heard: Grenade! Patience and future patience move!

rows.scripted: Stable. Try not to reopen anything.
rows.heard: Stable. Try not to reopen anything.

rows.scripted: Stay with me. Breathe when I tell you.
rows.heard: Stay with me. Breathe when I tell you.

rows.scripted: Beam on you. Stop dodging your healthcare.
rows.heard: Beam on you. Stop dodging your health care.

rows.scripted: Triage point here. Bring me anyone still arguing.
rows.heard: Triage point here. Bring me anyone still arguing.

rows.scripted: Load reduced. Infection is not permission to panic.
rows.heard: Load reduced. Infection is not permission to panic.

rows.scripted: Doctor Amina Okafor. I keep you alive; you make that difficult.
rows.heard: Dr. Amina Okafor, I keep you alive, you make that difficult.

rows.scripted: Threat treated.
rows.heard: Threat treated.

rows.scripted: Preventive medicine.
rows.heard: Preventive medicine.

rows.scripted: I am injured. Inconvenient, not terminal.
rows.heard: I am injured. Inconvenient, not terminal.

rows.scripted: Move. Bleeding may continue en route.
rows.heard: Move. Bleeding may continue en route.

rows.scripted: If you want treatment, stop running from the doctor!
rows.heard: If you want treatment, stop running from the doctor.

rows.scripted: Reloading. Please avoid emergencies for three seconds.
rows.heard: Reloading. Please avoid emergencies for three seconds.

rows.scripted: Thank you. Now point me at my patient.
rows.heard: Thank you. Now point me at my patient.

rows.scripted: Eyes open. You are not leaving my shift.
rows.heard: Eyes open. You are not leaving my shift.

rows.scripted: Self-stim. Doctor’s orders.
rows.heard: Self-stim. Doctor's orders.

rows.scripted: They are targeting the medic. How original.
rows.heard: They are targeting the medic. How original.

rows.scripted: I can reach them. Hold the lane.
rows.heard: I can reach him. Hold the lane.

rows.scripted: I’m in their side pocket—push!
rows.heard: I'm in their side pocket! Push!

rows.scripted: Beacon Alpha planted. This is where we leave.
rows.heard: Beacon Alpha Planet. This is where we leave.

rows.scripted: Beacon Beta live. This is where we surprise them.
rows.heard: Big and Beta Live, this is where we surprise them.

rows.scripted: Link is dead. Somebody found my door.
rows.heard: Link is dead. Somebody found my door.

rows.scripted: I’m opening a lane for the carrier.
rows.heard: I'm opening a lane for the carrier.

rows.scripted: The long way is for people with no imagination.
rows.heard: The long way is for people with no imagination.

rows.scripted: Route’s closed. Need a pickup.
rows.heard: Route's closed! Need a pickup!

rows.scripted: Shortest distance between us and winning.
rows.heard: Haha, shortest distance between us and winning.

rows.scripted: Flag fell off-route! Swing back!
rows.heard: Flag fell off route! Swing back!

rows.scripted: Flag on the express line. Clear my exit.
rows.heard: Flag on the express line! Clear my exit!

rows.scripted: Grenade on the route! Reroute!
rows.heard: Grenade on the route! Reroute!

rows.scripted: This lane bends through me now.
rows.heard: This lane bends through me now!

rows.scripted: Impulse out! Give ’em room to fly!
rows.heard: Impulse out! Give him room to fly!

rows.scripted: Sent them the scenic way.
rows.heard: Ha! Sent them the scenic way!

rows.scripted: Mateo Alvarez. Call me Skip. Maps show where people went; I show where we’re going.
rows.heard: Mateo Alvarez. Call me Skip. Maps show where people went. I show where we're going.

rows.scripted: You watched the road. Rookie mistake.
rows.heard: You watch the road. Rookie mistake.

rows.scripted: Shortcut just became a toll booth.
rows.heard: Shortcut just became a toll booth.

rows.scripted: Pair is hot. Step clean or lose your lunch.
rows.heard: Paris hot? Step clean or lose your lunch.

rows.scripted: I’m clipped. Speed’s still paid for.
rows.heard: I'm clipped. Speed's still paid for.

rows.scripted: Cutting left. Trust me for six seconds.
rows.heard: Cut and left. Trust me for six seconds.

rows.scripted: Reloading. Keep the doorway rude.
rows.heard: Reloading! Keep the doorway rude!

rows.scripted: Back on my feet. Where’s the gap?
rows.heard: Back on my feet. Where's the gat?

rows.scripted: Took the fast way to you. Stay awake.
rows.heard: Took the fast way to you. Stay awake.

rows.scripted: They found the shortcut! Need pressure!
rows.heard: They found the shortcut! Need pressure!

rows.scripted: Taking the shortcut—now.
rows.heard: Taking the shortcut, now!
